✦ Our Story

Born from Passion,
Woven with Care

Allamodadecor was born from a deep love for traditional knotting arts and a vision to bring handmade beauty into modern homes. Based in the heart of Delhi, we create each piece with intention, patience, and premium-quality natural fibers.

Our macrame is more than décor — it's wearable and liveable art that carries the warmth of human hands in every loop, twist, and knot. From intimate wall hangings to sculptural plant hangers, every creation tells a story.
